title: lycium scoparium lusus divaricatum
intro: Lycium scoparium lusus divaricatum is a variant of the box thorn or desert thorn, a type of shrub that belongs to the Solanaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are believed to help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Lycium scoparium lusus divaricatum include its potential to improve vision, reduce oxidative stress, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, often in the form of extracts or supplements, can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
